articles.title: MN - Matteo Gabbia underwent surgery for an inguinal hernia problem
articles.summary: According to what has been learned by the editorial staff of Milanews.it, today Matteo Gabbia had a consultation with professors Ernest Schilders and Rowena Johnson at the Mayo Clinic Healthcare in London.

articles.title: In four of the last nine away matches played by Milan, Maignan has not conceded a goal
articles.summary: According to what reported by Opta, Milan have won seven of the last nine away games played in Serie A (2N) and in four of these they have not conceded a goal.

articles.title: Tickets for Milan-Udinese, match after Easter, are now available (for season ticket holders).
articles.summary: On the occasion of the home match valid for the 32nd day of the Serie A championship, Milan will take the field against Udinese.

articles.title: Inter are at +10, but Milan are traveling at an excellent average: they have the same points as the last Scudetto
articles.summary: Milan have obtained 57 points in these first 27 matchdays, the exact same score recorded in the 2021/22 season at this point in the championship (the season of the Rossoneri's last Scudetto). Opta reports it.

articles.title: 23 appearances and three goals: Pavlovic has already improved last season both in terms of goals and appearances
articles.summary: Three goals for Strahinja Pavlovic in this championship (in 23 appearances), surpassing the haul of two goals (in 24 games) put together in the last Serie A. Opta reports it.

articles.title: Against Cremonese, Milan achieved a clean sheet: they are on the overall podium in Serie A
articles.summary: Clean sheets number 12 for Milan in this championship: only Inter (15) and Como (13) have obtained more so far - Roma and Lazio also have 12. Opta reports it.

articles.title: Insigne-Pescara, the love story is fulfilled: goals after 14 years

articles.title: Leao scored 9 goals in 20 league appearances: almost a goal every two games. And he already improved last year
articles.summary: Rafael Leao has scored 9 goals this season (in 20 appearances) and has surpassed the eight goals combined in last Serie A (34 appearances). Opta reports it.

articles.summary: On 3 March 2012, during a Palermo-Milan match valid for the twenty-sixth matchday of Serie A, Thiago Silva scored his last goal in an AC Milan shirt.
